hypotheses.title: Ghost Credentials - Dormant Accounts Active
hypotheses.hypothesis: Adversaries may obtain and abuse credentials of dormant accounts that have not been disabled after employee departure, enabling persistent access without triggering security alerts.
indicators: Successful authentication from IPs not previously associated with the account
First-time access to sensitive resources after extended inactivity
Multiple failed attempts followed by successful login
hypotheses.query_template: index=windowsEvents EventCode=4624 | where TimeGenerated > ago(90d) | where not(Account in (activeEmployees)) | where SrcIP not in (knownIPRanges)

hypotheses.title: Lateral Movement via SMB/Admin Shares
hypotheses.hypothesis: Attackers may use SMB/Admin shares to move laterally within the network, leveraging legitimate protocols for command execution.
indicators: Access to ADMIN$ or C$ shares from non-admin users
Execution of binaries from network shares
hypotheses.query_template: index=zeek conn_state="S0" dest_port=445 | stats count by src_ip dest_ip | where count > 10

hypotheses.title: C2 Beaconing Detection
hypotheses.hypothesis: Compromised hosts may establish periodic beaconing patterns to external C2 infrastructure, exhibiting regular time intervals and consistent data volumes.
indicators: Regular interval HTTP/HTTPS requests to external IPs
DNS queries to rare or suspicious domains
hypotheses.query_template: index=zeek_http | stats count, bytes_out by src_ip, dest_ip, uri | where frequency_match > 0.8

hypotheses.title: Privilege Escalation via Service Modification
hypotheses.hypothesis: Adversaries may create or modify Windows services to execute malicious code with elevated privileges.
indicators: New services created with binary path to temp folder
hypotheses.query_template: index=windowsEvents EventCode=7045 | where ServicePath contains "Temp" OR ServicePath contains "AppData"

hypotheses.title: Data Exfiltration via Cloud Storage
hypotheses.hypothesis: Attackers may exfiltrate data to cloud storage services using legitimate cloud sync utilities or direct uploads.
indicators: Large outbound data transfers to cloud storage domains
Access to personal cloud storage from corporate endpoints
hypotheses.query_template: index=proxy method=POST dest_port=443 | where dest_domain contains "dropbox" OR "google-drive" OR "onedrive" | stats sum(bytes_out) by src_ip

hypotheses.title: Registry Run Keys Persistence
hypotheses.hypothesis: Adversaries may add programs to run at system startup by modifying Windows registry Run keys or startup folders.
indicators: Suspicious file paths in autorun locations
hypotheses.query_template: index=sysmon EventID=13 TargetObject=*Run* | where Image not in (allowedBinaries)

hypotheses.title: Process Injection Detection
hypotheses.hypothesis: Adversaries may inject malicious code into legitimate processes to evade detection and gain elevated access.
indicators: Remote thread creation in system processes
hypotheses.query_template: index=sysmon EventID=8 | where TargetImage in (criticalProcesses) | where SourceImage contains "cmd" OR SourceImage contains "powershell"

hypotheses.title: Impossible Travel - Geographic Anomaly
hypotheses.hypothesis: Adversaries may use stolen credentials to authenticate from geographically impossible locations, indicating account compromise.
indicators: Logins from two locations within timeframe less than travel time
